L. 91–609, title IV, § 40184 Stat. 1781June 30, 1961Aug. 10, 1965Nov. 3, 1966May 25, 1967Dec. 31, 1970

Criteria for Grants for Historic Preservation, , , provided that beginning three years after , no grant shall be made (except pursuant to a contract or commitment entered into less than three years after such date) under provisions of sections 1453 or 1500d–1 of this title or section 461(h) of former Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, to the extent that it was to be used for historic or architectural preservation, except with respect to districts, sites, buildings, structures, and objects which the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development found met criteria comparable to those used in establishing the National Register maintained by the Secretary of the Interior pursuant to other provisions of law.Pub. L. 89–754, title VI, § 605(h)80 Stat. 1280Nov. 3, 1966Nov. 3, 1966
